story_summary: Player: I open the ancient door with the torch raised. DM: The door creaks open slowly, revealing a dusty library. Player: I cross the bridge carefully.DM: The bridge creaks under your weight.

history.dm: The bridge creaks under your weight, but you make it across.

history.user: I open the ancient door with the torch raised.
history.dm: The door creaks open slowly, revealing a dusty library filled with shadows.
